statement: No loss is a loss and I did what 98% of people are afraid to do. Litigate and fight for myself and now I am being transparent on the issues that they hide from. I was within my constitutional rights the entire time and never gave them full details of my life. No warrant can force the contents of what is in your mind.
interpretive_notes: The attachment is a raw saved portal page, not a finalized court order or narrative affidavit.
The capture contains portal/interface text and apparent account-session text.
For repository use, the cleanest approach is to preserve the raw file hash and add a separate normalized statement file.
